title: Siemens India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Siemens India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Siemens India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
